title: fear of death
author: june
body:
the concept of death is so interesting, 
how a human can hold philosophies, emotions, and understand complex societal structures to a inanimate object. people question what's really after death, and as a christian. 
fucking nothing, stop fearing that death is a pitch black fucking void, its nothing genuinely. there's nothing to be concerned because you cant feel, think or worry Abt being "bored" why is it so hard to understand that nothing is the exact same as before being born.
